name: Linear Import
description: Import Linear issues into Fusion tasks through plugin-owned settings, routes, tools, and dashboard view.
author: Fusion

apiKey.label: Linear API key
apiKey.description: Personal Linear API key used only by this plugin to browse and import issues.

defaultTeamKey.label: Default team key or ID
defaultTeamKey.description: Optional Linear team key or UUID to prefill issue searches.

defaultStateFilter.label: Default issue state filter
defaultStateFilter.description: Initial issue state filter for browse and import tools.

defaultAssigneeId.label: Default assignee ID
defaultAssigneeId.description: Optional Linear user UUID used as the default assignee filter.

dashboardViews.label: Linear Import
dashboardViews.description: Browse Linear issues and import selected issues as Fusion tasks.
